description: This file is a TypeScript source file that defines an Astro.js plugin for project bootstrap, including configuration hooks, static asset management, and auto-import of components.

methods.name: bootstrap
methods.description: Main function that sets up Astro integrations including sitemap, MDX, and custom hooks.

methods.name: bootstrap_auto_import
methods.description: Automatically imports components from specified directories and generates type definitions.

methods.name: copyBootstrap
methods.description: Copies Bootstrap distribution files into the public directory for versioned access.

methods.name: copyStatic
methods.description: Copies static assets into the public directory.

methods.name: aliasStatic
methods.description: Creates static file aliases in the public directory.

methods.name: copyStaticRecursively
methods.description: Recursively copies static files and directories.

methods.name: replacePathVersionPlaceholder
methods.description: Replaces '[version]' placeholder in paths with current docs version.

methods.name: sitemapFilter
methods.description: Filters pages for sitemap exclusion based on predefined list.
